# [Clang] Assertion failure in ASTContext::getQualifiedTemplateName on invalid template-template-parameter syntax

**Author:** YuchangSu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/186576
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-14T20:54:27Z

## Body

Code:
```CPP
template <template <> a>::a <
```

Assertion failure:
```text
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/AST/ASTContext.cpp:10430: clang::TemplateName clang::ASTContext::getQualifiedTemplateName(clang::NestedNameSpecifier, bool, clang::TemplateName) const: Assertion `!Qualifier && "unexpected qualified template template parameter"' failed.
```
